description: Residue BLS12-381 Groth16 verifier: g2check [|x|]B==psi(B) subgroup check (4 ch) + vk_x MSM (12 ch) + Miller-fused witnessed-residue final-exp (ePrint 2024/640, fused-miller 32 ch + residue-tail 1 ch) -> verdict (mutable->immutable). The fused Miller folds c^-|x| into the loop; the inverse-free tail checks Frob(c,1)==fF*w (c per-limb canonical, c*cInv==ONE, w in Fp6, c transcript-bound). State threaded as transcript-anchored NFT commitments (T0=hash(A,B,C), T1, forward-chain pins, shared-tower relocation). Every step verified on the real standard BCH-2026 VM with its correct covenant tx.
